signals.headline: The SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs**, a development that has fundamentally shifted market
signals.raw:
The SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs**, a development that has fundamentally shifted market sentiment and catalyzed XRP's strongest rally since September 2025[1]. XRP has gained nearly 10% over the past week alone, breaking above the $1.50 resistance level and settling around $1.42[1].

This regulatory resolution removes a multi-year legal burden that had constrained XR

signals.headline: Conservative year-end price targets suggest XRP could reach $2
signals.raw:
Conservative year-end price targets suggest XRP could reach $2.71, representing a doubling from current levels, while more optimistic forecasts cluster in the $3.50 to $5.00 range contingent on additional catalysts like XRP ETF approvals and major banking partnerships[1]
